errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"message":"Service for this project is restricted due to the following violations: exceed_egress_quota. The project owner must upgrade their plan or remove spend caps to restore service."}

description: Get details of one product by id (from search_products).

description.name: buy
description.description: 'Buy' a product (100% fake, no payment). Returns an order id. Then call track_order to watch the absurd delivery. Nothing real happens — it's a joke.

description.name: track_order
description.description: Track a fake order by id. The journey runs on a fast clock (~2 min) — call a few times to watch it travel and (maybe) get eaten by a whale.
